name: basic-manual-empty-plan
purpose: Semantic corner case: the empty plan is sufficient because every start state already satisfies the goal.

name: basic-manual-vacuous-precondition
purpose: Semantic corner case: the precondition is false everywhere, so Kh holds vacuously.

name: basic-manual-reliable-plan
purpose: A deterministic two-step plan witnesses Kh(start,goal).

name: basic-manual-nondet-success
purpose: The first action is nondeterministic, but every possible successor satisfies the goal.

name: basic-manual-multistart-success
purpose: The same one-step plan works from all states satisfying the precondition.

name: basic-manual-trap-failure
purpose: Reachability is not enough: the action may also lead to a non-goal trap.

name: basic-manual-dead-end-failure
purpose: The available action reaches a dead non-goal state, so no plan guarantees the goal.

name: basic-robot-safe-plan-positive
purpose: Robot corridor case study: a safe action guarantees progress to the goal despite the presence of risky behaviour.

name: basic-robot-risky-only-negative
purpose: Robot corridor case study: the goal is reachable, but every risky move can also fall into a trap.

name: basic-robot-multistart-positive
purpose: Robot corridor case study: the same safe plan works from multiple possible starting states.

name: basic-rescue-safe-route-positive
purpose: Autonomous rescue case study: the robot has a reliable plan to enter the building, locate the survivor, and complete the evacuation.

name: basic-rescue-risky-branch-negative
purpose: Autonomous rescue case study: the survivor is reachable, but the only available risky move can also lead to a smoke or collapse trap.

name: regular-manual-empty-plan

name: regular-manual-vacuous-precondition
purpose: Semantic corner case: the precondition is false everywhere, so any available plan class satisfies the requirement.

name: regular-manual-single-good-class
purpose: The agent has one available regular plan class, and it guarantees reaching the goal.

name: regular-manual-good-bad-class
purpose: The agent cannot distinguish a good one-step plan from a bad one-step plan in the same automaton class.

name: regular-manual-not-strongly-executable

name: regular-manual-unaware-good-action

name: regular-manual-agent-one-knows

name: regular-manual-agent-two-fails

purpose: Semantic corner case: the empty plan is available and consumes no budget.

purpose: A two-step plan reaches the goal and exactly fits the available budget.

name: budget-manual-over-budget
purpose: The same two-step plan is available and reaches the goal, but it exceeds the budget.
